participant_id.Description: Unique participant identifier matching entries in participants.tsv (format: sub-Damy###).

recorded_date.Description: Date the responses were recorded (in YYYY-MM-DD format).

sleep.Description: How many hours did you sleep last night?

awake.Description: How awake do you feel right now? [1 = very sleepy, 10 = very awake]

enjoyment.Description: How much did you enjoy today's movie clips? [1 = not at all, 5 = very much]

engagement.Description: How much did you find today's movie clips engaging? [1 = not at all, 5 = very much]
